Gunner.OrdnanceSLTooltip: Roll Gunnery to generate Points for Accuracy, Penetration, and Firepower allocation.
Gunner.RangingFireDesc: Fires half a salvo at −2 to hit. If any shot connects, it brackets the target – granting +2 to hit against that ship with ALL weapon batteries for the rest of the round.

Helm.EvasionTooltip: Each point allocated increases your ship's AC by 1 this round.
Helm.PilotingSLTooltip: Roll Piloting to generate Points for Speed, Maneuverability, and Evasion allocation.

Engineer.EngineeringSLTooltip: Roll Engineering to generate Points for Speed, Maneuverability, and Evasion allocation.

Captain.LeadershipSLTooltip: Roll Leadership to generate Points for Inspire, Resolve, and Initiative allocation.

Desc.repairArmour: Fully restore rend damage on one sector, resetting its effective hardness to maximum.

Core.BCPrompt: Choose an enemy to designate as the priority target. All weapons fired at this target gain +10 accuracy, 2 hardness penetration, and 2 shield burn this round.
Core.RAPrompt: Choose which sector to fully restore rend hardness damage.

Component.HitRatingModifierDesc: Applies a flat bonus or penalty to the hit roll for all shots from this battery.
Component.OverclockBaseDCHint: Base DC for overclock checks at minimum heat. Scales up by 10 at maximum reactor heat.

Tooltip.OverclockDC: Overclock the reactor: DC {dc} {skill} check, +1 Heat
Tooltip.Classification: The ship's class or type designation
Tooltip.Model: The manufacturer's model designation for this vessel
Tooltip.Crew: Minimum number of crew members required to operate this ship
Tooltip.Passengers: Maximum number of passengers this ship can carry
Tooltip.Price: The purchase price of this ship

Sensors.DeepScanDesc: Upgrade to Lock 3. Reveals hardness, shield values, hull, AC, and weapon fire arcs per sector. Shows actual ship name.
Sensors.TargetingSolutionDesc: Upgrade to Lock 4. Reveals conditions and defenses (immunities, weaknesses, resistances). Gunner gets +2 to accuracy against this target.
Sensors.SensorDisruptionDesc: Requires Lock 1. Designate one locked enemy. It suffers a penalty to all rolls (including weapon accuracy) equal to your sensors' Hit Modifier, minimum -1, for 1 round.

BDA.AdjustBearingDesc: +2 to hit on the next attack with this weapon at this target.
BDA.TargetWeakPointDesc: +Points bonus to hardness penetration on the next attack.
BDA.FireForEffectDesc: Each Point reduces the critical hit threshold by 1 (base crit requires exceeding AC by 10; stacks with the Devastating weapon trait).

Payload.APShellsDesc: +2 hardness penetration on all macro cannon attacks this round.

Trait.RendDesc: Each hit that gets through shields permanently reduces sector hardness by this value - even if hardness absorbs all resulting hull damage. The hardness reduction still occurs regardless of whether hull damage is dealt.
Trait.ArmourPenetrationDesc: Reduces the target sector's effective hardness by this value when calculating damage per hit.
Trait.DevastatingDesc: Lowers the critical-hit margin by this value (base: crit on exceeding AC by 10, so Devastating 2 crits at AC+8). Each critting shot also deals bonus damage equal to this value, still reduced by the target's hardness.
Trait.UnreliableDesc: On a critical failure — the shot misses by 10 or more after nat-20/nat-1 degree adjustments — the shot jams and the entire salvo is lost. A natural 1 that is promoted to a miss (e.g. nat-1 on a hit) does not trigger a jam.
